summary: KYC Sync & Recovery feature testing completed. All 5 endpoints working correctly. Auto-sync logic properly detects and fixes mismatches between document_status and profile kyc_status. Frontend AdminKYC page shows all sync buttons (Sync by Email, Find Orphaned, Sync All).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ GET /api/kyc/check-status/{uid} - Returns correct status with was_auto_synced flag
✅ POST /api/admin/kyc/resync-by-email - Syncs KYC by email/mobile, returns old_status and new_status
✅ POST /api/kyc/reset-for-resubmit/{uid} - Correctly blocks verified users, allows pending/rejected reset
✅ GET /api/admin/kyc/orphaned-requests - Finds users with pending status but no document
✅ Auto-sync logic: When document_status=verified but kyc_status=pending, automatically updates user profile
✅ Frontend KYCVerification.js: Has 'Check KYC Status' button that shows status modal with auto-sync toast
✅ Frontend AdminKYC.js: Shows 'Sync by Email', 'Find Orphaned', 'Sync All' buttons
✅ AdminKYC modal explains: 'If Admin approved but user still sees pending, this will fix it'
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC sync feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/kyc/check-status/{uid} (auto-syncs mismatches), POST /api/admin/kyc/resync-by-email (manual sync), GET /api/admin/kyc/orphaned-requests, POST /api/admin/kyc/fix-all-orphaned. Admin can sync via AdminKYC page buttons. User sees 'Check KYC Status' button on KYCVerification page when status is pending.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: When admin approves KYC, only kyc_documents.status was updated to 'verified', but users.kyc_status remained 'pending'. Fix: Added auto-sync logic in /kyc/check-status endpoint that detects this mismatch (document_status='verified' but kyc_status='pending') and automatically updates the user profile. The was_auto_synced flag in response indicates when this auto-fix occurred.
